g.title: gabbro_crypto_stack
g.text: passphrase → Argon2id → HKDF-SHA256 → AES-256-GCM (header bound as AAD)

g.title: note_aad
g.text: VERSION 7+ header integrity: the entire plaintext header
— Argon2 params, salts, YubiKey records, alias, passphrase_blob —
is the AES-GCM AAD. Any header tamper

g.title: note_v11
g.text: VERSION 11 (ADR-018): the vault key is derived straight from
the Argon2id output via HKDF, removing the X25519 + ML-KEM-1024
hybrid key exchange (it was non-load-bearing — both keypairs
derived from the passphrase). RT-3 deleted that layer and both
crates: v11 is the oldest readable format, and a v2–v10 vault is

g.title: note_pp
g.text: Passphrase change re-runs Argon2id + HKDF and re-wraps
wrapping_key into a new passphrase_blob; key_blobs and
the vault body are unchanged (any one key still opens).
